title: CVE-2025-11573 - Denial of Service issue in Amazon.IonDotnet
description:
CVE-2025-11573 - Denial of Service issue in Amazon.IonDotnet
Posted on:
Oct 9, 2025
Bulletin ID:
AWS-2025-022
Scope:
Amazon
Content Type:
Important (requires attention)
Publication Date:
2025/10/09 11:00 AM PDT
Description:
Amazon.IonDotnet is a library for the Dotnet language that is used to read and write Amazon Ion data.
We identified
CVE-2025-11573
, which describes an infinite loop issue in Amazon.IonDotnet library versions <v1.3.2 that may allow a threat actor to cause a denial of service through a specially crafted text input. As of August 20, 2025, this library has been deprecated and will not receive further updates.
Affected versions:
<1.3.2
Resolution:
This issue has been addressed in Amazon.IonDotnet version
1.3.2
. We recommend upgrading to the latest version and ensuring any forked or derivative code is patched to incorporate the new fixes.
Workarounds:
Only accept data from trusted sources, written using a supported Ion library.
References:
CVE-2025-11573
GHSA-q5r6-9qwq-g2wj
Please email
aws-security@amazon.com
with any security questions or concerns.
affected: aws:Amazon.IonDotnet is a library for the Dotnet language that is used to read and write Amazon Ion data.
